heroImageAlt: A bright, flexible room set up for a community session
heroShortDescription: Flexible, welcoming spaces for your community events.
mainIntro1: Our building offers calm, accessible spaces that can be hired for meetings, workshops, support sessions, training days and community events.
mainIntro2: When rooms are not in use for hospice services, we make them available to local groups and organisations who share our community-focused values.

spacesList.text: Small community events and private bookings

featuresList.text: A friendly welcome from our team
Flexible hire options subject to availability

formIntro: Complete the form below and we will contact you with availability, pricing and next steps.
